elements.name: Description
texts: "But we have not yet reached the island. We are still on the landing-stage looking up the long reaches of the lake (it covers and area of twenty square miles), noting the high, bleak, purple mountains which surround it, and the number of pretty islets with which its surface is covered."

elements.name: Source
texts: Gibbons, Margaret, Guide to St. Patrick’s Purgatory, Lough Derg, p. 11

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism
